title: UmbracoStorageProvidersSchema
description: Defines the appsettings JSON schema for Umbraco Storage Providers configuration.

Umbraco.description: Configuration container for all Umbraco products.

UmbracoDefinition.description: Represents the configuration container for all Umbraco products.

StorageDefinition.description: Represents the configuration of Umbraco Storage Providers.

Cdn.description: The CDN media URL provider options.

CdnMediaUrlProviderOptions.description: The CDN media URL provider options.

Url.description: Gets or sets the CDN media root URL.

RemoveMediaFromPath.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to remove the UmbracoMediaPath from the path, defaults to true.
